title: diapensiaceae
intro: The diapensiaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, consisting of approximately 20 species. It is native to the Northern Hemisphere, with a majority of species found in North America and eastern Asia. The diapensiaceae family is characterized by its small, bell-shaped flowers and hairy leaves, often growing in shaded, woodland areas. These plants are often low-growing and produce small white or pink flowers in late spring to early summer.
